name: Easy Mango Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mango in a food processor and process until smooth.
2. Combine mango puree and remaining ingredients in an 11 x 7-inch baking dish; stir well.
3. Cover and freeze at least 4 hours. Let soften slightly at room temperature before serving.
Yield: 5 cups (serving size: 1/2 cup)
